seoTitle: Upskill in Operations & Support — skills, next roles & moves | SkillKite
seoDescription: Upskill in Operations & Support — process, tools, next roles & side moves

guide.heading: Your next career move — SkillKite
guide.greeting: Hi there! You are working in Operations & Support and are still exploring your next move. Here are the highest-leverage skills and next roles for your field — listed by relevance.

sections.title: Skills to add now
sections.intro: These skills have the highest salary and seniority leverage in your current field.

options.name: Process Improvement & Lean Six Sigma
options.whatIsIt: A structured methodology (Define-Measure-Analyse-Improve-Control) used to eliminate waste and inefficiency in business processes. Tools include value stream mapping, root cause analysis, and control charts.
options.whoFor: Ops professionals who are already running or auditing processes and want to move into a senior or management track. Especially valuable in manufacturing, logistics, BPO, and shared services.
options.leadsTo: Process Excellence Analyst, Operations Manager, Business Process Consultant — salary band ₹50k-1.2L/month in Tier 2/3 markets.
options.keyExams: Lean Six Sigma Green Belt (LSSGB) or Black Belt (LSSBB) — offered by KPMG, ASQ, or IASSC-accredited bodies. Green Belt is the entry gate; most employers accept it.
options.timeCommitment: 2-3 months for Green Belt study + project; 4-6 months for Black Belt.

options.name: Data Analysis with Excel + Power BI
options.whatIsIt: Using advanced Excel (pivot tables, Power Query, VLOOKUP/INDEX-MATCH) alongside Power BI dashboards to track KPIs, SLAs, headcount productivity, and cost metrics — the actual language ops managers speak.
options.whoFor: Any ops or support professional who currently pulls reports manually or sends raw spreadsheets to leadership. This closes the visibility gap and makes you the go-to person for decision data.
options.leadsTo: Operations Analyst, MIS Executive, Business Analyst — salary band ₹35k-80k/month. Adds ₹8k-15k to existing CTC at most mid-size companies.
options.keyExams: Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst (PL-300) certification is well-recognised. Excel has no single mandatory cert but an online course portfolio is sufficient.
options.timeCommitment: 2-3 months to become job-ready for analyst-level work.

options.name: ITIL 4 Foundation (for IT Ops / Service Desk professionals)
options.whatIsIt: ITIL 4 is the globally recognised framework for IT service management — covering incident management, change management, service desk operations, and SLA governance. The Foundation certificate is the minimum hiring bar for IT ops roles.
options.whoFor: Professionals in IT support, helpdesk, service delivery, or vendor management. If you are in non-IT ops, skip this and prioritise PMP or Lean instead.
options.leadsTo: IT Service Delivery Manager, Service Desk Lead, ITSM Analyst — salary band ₹45k-90k/month. Global captive centres and GCCs in Tier 2 cities actively hire for this.
options.keyExams: ITIL 4 Foundation — offered by PeopleCert / Axelos. One exam, ~₹10k-15k cost, widely accepted.
options.timeCommitment: 4-6 weeks of preparation; exam can be taken online.

options.name: Project Management (PMP / CAPM / Google PM Certificate)
options.whatIsIt: Formal project management skills — scope definition, scheduling (Gantt, critical path), stakeholder communication, risk registers, and budget tracking. PMP is the gold standard; CAPM or Google's certificate is the stepping stone.
options.whoFor: Ops professionals who are already coordinating between teams, vendors, or locations but have no formal PM credential. This legitimises what you are already doing and opens hiring pipelines that screen by certification.
options.leadsTo: Project Coordinator, Operations Project Manager, Program Manager — salary band ₹55k-1.2L/month. PMP holders command a noticeable premium even in Tier 2 cities.
options.keyExams: PMP (PMI) requires 36 months of experience — apply once eligible. Google Project Management Certificate (Coursera) is a faster 6-month credential with no experience gate. CAPM is the PMI entry-level option.
options.timeCommitment: 3-4 months for Google certificate; 4-6 months for CAPM; 6-9 months for PMP preparation.

options.name: CRM & Ticketing Tools — Salesforce, Zendesk, Freshdesk
options.whatIsIt: Hands-on proficiency in customer relationship management and support ticketing platforms — including workflow automation, SLA configuration, escalation rules, and reporting dashboards inside these tools.
options.whoFor: Customer support, service ops, and back-office professionals. Knowing one platform deeply makes you a system owner, not just a user — which is a different hiring conversation entirely.
options.leadsTo: CRM Administrator, Support Operations Lead, Customer Success Ops — salary band ₹40k-85k/month. Salesforce Admin certification is one of the clearest salary-bump credentials in support ops.
options.keyExams: Salesforce Certified Administrator (ADM-201) is the most valued. Zendesk and Freshdesk have free in-platform learning with completion badges.
options.timeCommitment: 2-3 months for Salesforce Admin certification; 4-6 weeks for Zendesk/Freshdesk proficiency.

options.name: SQL for Operations Reporting
options.whatIsIt: Writing SQL queries to pull and clean operational data directly from databases — instead of waiting on a data team. Covers SELECT, JOIN, GROUP BY, subqueries, and basic window functions. Most ops teams use MySQL, PostgreSQL, or MS SQL Server.
options.whoFor: Ops professionals in companies that have a data warehouse or ERP system (SAP, Oracle, Zoho). If your organisation runs on spreadsheets alone, deprioritise this and focus on Power BI first.
options.leadsTo: Operations Analyst, Business Analyst, MIS Lead — the combination of SQL + Power BI is what most BA job descriptions actually require. Unlocks salary band ₹50k-1L/month.
options.keyExams: No mandatory certification — a portfolio of 3-5 real business queries on GitHub is more convincing than any exam. Mode Analytics or HackerRank SQL certificates add credibility.
options.timeCommitment: 2-3 months to reach a job-useful level.

sections.title: Roles to target next
sections.intro: These are the most realistic and high-leverage next-rung roles for an ops and support professional with 1-10 years of experience.

options.name: Operations Analyst / MIS Analyst
options.whatIsIt: Owns the numbers side of an ops team — builds dashboards, tracks SLAs and KPIs, prepares daily/weekly/monthly ops reports, and flags deviations to leadership. Uses Excel, Power BI, SQL, and sometimes Python for automation.
options.whoFor: Ops professionals who already pull data informally and want to make it their primary job. Works well for people who are detail-oriented and comfortable with tools.
options.leadsTo: Senior Analyst → Business Analyst → Analytics Manager. Salary band ₹35k-75k/month in Tier 2/3 cities; ₹60k-1.2L/month for remote roles with larger firms.
options.keyExams: Power BI PL-300, SQL portfolio, optional Google Data Analytics certificate.
options.timeCommitment: 3-5 months of upskilling; transition timeline 4-8 months depending on internal move vs external application.

options.name: Business Analyst (Operations / Process)
options.whatIsIt: Bridges the gap between business teams and tech/project teams — documents requirements, maps current and future processes (as-is/to-be), writes user stories, and tracks delivery. In ops-heavy firms, focuses on process redesign and ERP customisation.
options.whoFor: Experienced ops professionals who understand multiple business functions and can communicate clearly with both executives and developers. Best suited for people with 3+ years of cross-functional exposure.
options.leadsTo: Senior BA → Product Owner → BA Manager or Pre-Sales Consultant. Salary band ₹50k-1L/month; remote roles go up to ₹1.2L-1.5L/month.
options.keyExams: CBAP (for 5+ years experience) or ECBA/CCBA (entry-level) from IIBA. PMP or Agile/Scrum certifications (CSM, PSM) are also commonly listed as requirements.
options.timeCommitment: 4-8 months to transition; internal moves are faster if you can volunteer for a current project.

options.name: Operations Team Lead / Assistant Manager
options.whatIsIt: Manages a small team of 5-15 ops or support executives — handles scheduling, performance reviews, escalation handling, process compliance, and reporting to senior management. This is the most natural vertical move from individual contributor.
options.whoFor: Ops professionals with 3+ years who already informally mentor teammates, handle escalations, or deputise for the manager. The move is less about new skills and more about demonstrating readiness.
options.leadsTo: Operations Manager → Senior Manager → VP of Operations. Salary band ₹40k-80k/month at Tier 2/3 companies; ₹70k-1.2L at larger organisations or GCCs.
options.keyExams: No hard gate — but Lean Six Sigma Green Belt or PMP significantly strengthens the case for a formal promotion.
options.timeCommitment: Typically 6-18 months of internal positioning; external applications are possible with a strong CV showing ownership and impact.

options.name: Vendor / Procurement Operations Specialist
options.whatIsIt: Manages vendor contracts, purchase orders, SLA compliance, and procurement workflows. Uses tools like SAP Ariba, Oracle Procurement, or Zoho Purchase. Increasingly a strategic role as companies push cost optimisation.
options.whoFor: Ops professionals who already coordinate with vendors, raise POs, or manage contracts. Common in manufacturing, retail, logistics, FMCG, and IT services.
options.leadsTo: Procurement Manager → Supply Chain Manager → Category Manager. Salary band ₹45k-90k/month; CIPS/SCM certifications unlock higher-paying MNC roles.
options.keyExams: CIPS Level 4 (Chartered Institute of Procurement and Supply) is the international gold standard. ISM (Institute for Supply Management) certifications are also respected.
options.timeCommitment: 3-6 months to get CIPS-ready; transition timeline 4-9 months.

options.name: Customer Success / Service Delivery Manager
options.whatIsIt: Owns the end-to-end client experience for a portfolio of accounts — tracks SLAs, resolves escalations, conducts quarterly reviews, and identifies upsell or retention risks. Common in SaaS, IT services, BPO, and managed services firms.
options.whoFor: Support and ops professionals who have strong communication skills and regularly interface with clients or internal stakeholders. Good fit for people who enjoy relationship management alongside process work.
options.leadsTo: Senior CSM → Head of Customer Success → VP Customer Experience. Salary band ₹45k-90k/month in Tier 2/3; remote SaaS roles pay ₹80k-1.5L/month.
options.keyExams: Gainsight's Customer Success certification or SuccessHACKER courses are respected in SaaS. ITIL Foundation is valued in IT service delivery roles.
options.timeCommitment: 2-4 months of upskilling on CS tools and frameworks; transition timeline 3-6 months.

sections.title: Side moves
sections.intro: These adjacent fields absorb ops and support skills well — worth knowing even if you are not planning to switch right now.

options.name: Human Resources Operations (HR Ops)
options.whatIsIt: Manages the back-end of HR — payroll processing, HRMS administration (Darwinbox, SAP SuccessFactors, Zoho People), compliance tracking, onboarding/offboarding workflows, and workforce data reporting.
options.whoFor: Ops professionals who already handle headcount data, attendance, or coordinate with HR for their team. The process-management muscle transfers directly.
options.leadsTo: HR Operations Analyst → HR Manager → HRBP. Salary band ₹35k-80k/month. HRMS tool expertise is the fastest differentiator.
options.keyExams: No mandatory gate, but SHRM-CP or PHRi (HRCI) credentials strengthen senior HR Ops applications. Darwinbox or SAP SuccessFactors training courses add tool credibility.
options.timeCommitment: 3-5 months to upskill; lateral move is realistic within 4-6 months.

options.name: Supply Chain & Logistics Coordination
options.whatIsIt: Covers demand planning, inventory management, warehouse coordination, and last-mile delivery tracking using tools like SAP ERP, Oracle SCM, or Microsoft Dynamics. High demand in e-commerce, FMCG, pharma, and auto sectors.
options.whoFor: Ops professionals in manufacturing, retail, or e-commerce who already touch inventory, dispatch, or vendor coordination. The overlap with general ops work is significant.
options.leadsTo: Supply Chain Analyst → Logistics Manager → SCM Lead. Salary band ₹40k-90k/month in Tier 2/3. Certification-holders in SCM are actively hired by Tier-1 companies opening satellite offices.
options.keyExams: APICS CPIM (Certified in Planning and Inventory Management) or CSCP (Certified Supply Chain Professional) are the internationally recognised credentials.
options.timeCommitment: 4-6 months to get CPIM-ready; full transition 5-9 months.

options.name: EdTech / Training & Development Operations
options.whatIsIt: Manages learning operations at companies or EdTech platforms — scheduling training cohorts, managing LMS platforms (TalentLMS, Moodle, Cornerstone), tracking learner progress, and coordinating with trainers and vendors.
options.whoFor: Ops professionals who have informally trained new joiners, created SOPs, or managed onboarding programmes. Also suits people who want a lower-stress, purpose-driven environment.
options.leadsTo: L&D Coordinator → Training Manager → L&D Head. Salary band ₹35k-70k/month. EdTech startups also hire for Ops roles that blend this with customer success.
options.keyExams: No hard gate — but ATD (Association for Talent Development) certifications (CPTD or APTD) are respected for senior L&D roles. LMS tool certifications are practical differentiators.
options.timeCommitment: 2-4 months of upskilling; transition is often an internal move or into an EdTech startup within 3-6 months.

guide.closingMessage: These are the highest-leverage skills and roles for your field. Pick one skill, go deep for 3 months, and build a portfolio — that is what changes the interview game. Come back to SkillKite when you want a specific roadmap for your next role. Share it with a colleague who needs it. 🪁
